description_long: This object consists of two stacked hardcover books, both bound together by a wide, gray strap with yellow stitching running down its center. The top book features a blue cover with a subtle diagonal texture, while the bottom book has a green cover. The spines of the books are black with yellow marbling and two yellow horizontal bands, giving them a classic, slightly ornate appearance. The pages are white with a slight greenish tint, and the edges are clean and straight. The strap appears to be made of a synthetic material and is tightly wrapped around the books, holding them securely together.
description: Two hardcover books, one blue and one green, are stacked and tightly bound by a gray strap with yellow stitching.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue and green book covers stacked, with the gray strap running horizontally across the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black spines with yellow marbling and bands, and the strap running vertically down the center.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the blue and green covers and the strap, but with the opposite book edges visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full blue cover of the top book and the gray strap with yellow stitching running lengthwise.
attribute_spine_design: The spines are black with yellow marbling and two horizontal yellow bands. No visible text or decorative elements beyond the marbling and bands.
